title: Vulnerability Lifecycle Tracker — State Machine Metrics & SLA Breach Alerts
description: vuln_lifecycle.py implements a 9-state FSM (DISCOVERED→TRIAGED→ASSIGNED→IN_PROGRESS→FIXED→VERIFIED→CLOSED/REOPENED/WONT_FIX) with flow metrics and bottleneck detection. vuln_lifecycle_router.py exposes the full API. Gap: stage transition events are not published to the EventBus, so other engines (SLA, notification, posture scoring) are not notified of lifecycle changes.
missing: EventBus publication on state transition: publish a VulnLifecycleEvent to EventBus on every state change so SLA, notification, and posture engines react
SLA breach alert on ASSIGNED→IN_PROGRESS delay: if a finding stays in ASSIGNED for longer than the SLA deadline, fire a notification to the assignee
Bottleneck dashboard widget: /api/v1/vuln-lifecycle/bottlenecks endpoint returning stage distribution and avg_days_in_stage for pipeline visualization
